title: Effortless Copy–Paste: Excel Column Monday.com Column

posts.author: jacklin123 (jack lin)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi everyone!

I often need to transfer data from Excel into my Monday.com boards and would love to streamline the process. Here’s what I’m hoping to achieve:

  • Copy an entire column from Excel (e.g., client names, due dates, statuses)

  • Paste it into a corresponding Monday.com column effortlessly—no errors or mismatched formatting

  • Preserve the integrity of column types (Text, Date, Status, etc.)

If you’ve got tips, tricks, or settings that make this quick and reliable, I’d really appreciate your insights! Specifically:

  • Best practices for matching Monday.com column types

  • Any shortcuts or plugins that help automate the process

  • Troubleshooting common paste issues (like alignment or formatting errors)

Thanks in advance for your help!

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml:
Are you creating a new board each time or trying to update the existing board with the info from excel?

posts.author: ProjectMastermind (IngenuityKat)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi jack lin, welcome to the community!

For transferring data from Excel to monday, the best practice is to use monday’s Import Excel feature rather than copying and pasting individual columns. This helps avoid formatting errors and ensures the data types in monday columns (Text, Date, Status, etc.) match the Excel columns correctly.

Here’s why the import feature is usually better:

  • It lets you map Excel columns directly to the corresponding monday column types, preserving data integrity.

  • You can import entire rows/items, not just single columns, making it faster for large datasets.

  • monday supports importing XLSX or CSV files and guides you through mapping the data.

  • It handles common formatting problems and alerts you if there are mismatches.

  • After import, you can tweak column types if needed without losing data.

If you want to copy-paste, you can do that, but it often causes alignment or formatting issues, especially with column types like Dates or Statuses that have specific formats in monday.

If you’re not already, I recommend trying the Import Items option from your board’s “+ Add” menu. Just upload your Excel file, map columns, and you’re good to go!

Official import guide here:
https://support.monday.com/hc/en-us/articles/360000219209-Import-files-from-Excel

Let us know if you need help with any specific import issues or tips on preparing your Excel file.
